parsed.company_summary: Comparis is a Swiss company operating one of Switzerland's largest real estate platforms (Homefinder). They cultivate a culture of transparency, mutual respect, trust, and lifelong learning with flat hierarchies and flexible working hours.

parsed.company_summary: Philo is a TV streaming service that offers 70+ networks, 85,000+ titles, and unlimited DVR. Headquartered in San Francisco with offices in New York and Cambridge, MA. Backed by NEA and industry partners including Discovery, Viacom, AMC, and A&E. Leadership includes a cofounder of Facebook and alums of Meraki and HBO.

job_file: Remote Lead AI Engineer & Technical Architect.txt

parsed.company_summary: Bold Business is an AI-first U.S. based global workforce solutions company that builds AI-Amplified Talent, custom AI agents, and automation systems for clients like AT&T, JP Morgan, and Verizon.

must_have_skills: Go OR TypeScript OR React OR comparable tools
parsed.company_summary: SuperPlane is building the AI-native control plane for platform engineering. They are an early-stage, small, ambitious company building open-source dev tools for engineers.
red_flags: Salary range is very wide ($70k-$150k) which may indicate unclear expectations or leveling.
Posting asks applicants to include a specific code word ('EXCELLANT') to prove they read the post — this is a common anti-spam tactic but can be seen as a minor friction point.

parsed.company_summary: Stripe is a company building the financial infrastructure of the internet, handling millions of transactions per day.

must_have_skills: ReactJS OR VueJS OR AngularJS OR MVC
parsed.company_summary: Doctors.net.uk is the UK's largest professional network of doctors, a subsidiary of M3 Inc. M3 EU provides digital solutions across healthcare, life sciences, and pharmaceuticals, engaging physician communities globally.

must_have_skills: full-stack engineering with heavy backend lean
parsed.company_summary: Metriport is an open-source data intelligence platform that helps healthcare organizations access and exchange patient data in real-time. They have multi-million ARR, 100+ customers, and backing from top VCs.
red_flags: Uses 'olympian-level work ethic' and 'hacker at heart' language, indicating potential weak management culture.
Founders work six days a week from the SF office — suggests unsustainable intensity expectations.
Daily stand-up at 7:30am PST Mon-Fri — early mandatory meeting may indicate rigid culture despite claiming flexibility.
Unlimited PTO listed alongside 'we work hard' and founders working six days a week — typical contradiction where unlimited PTO is rarely used.

parsed.company_summary: Madhive is the leading independent and customizable operating system for modern TV advertising, helping local media professionals build profitable businesses. The company powers campaigns for over 30,000 small and medium businesses per day and is valued at $500M+.

Metriport is an open-source data intelligence platform that helps healthcare organizations access and exchange patient data in real-time. They have multi-million ARR, 100+ customers (including Amazon One Medical, Strive Health, Circle Medical, and Brightside Health), and backing from top VCs.
red_flags: Founders work six days a week from the SF office — suggests an intense culture that may not be sustainable for all.
Language like 'olympian-level work ethic' and 'why can't it be done in 3 days?' may indicate unrealistic expectations around pace and workload.

parsed.location: New York, South Florida, Los Angeles (2026)

They have a multi-specialty team of 60+ in-house physicians and a nonprofit research institute.

Their customers include hypersonic aircraft companies, satellite and space mission systems companies, and AI/software companies serving the aerospace and defense industry.
